chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 940 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of post-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail 13.11.2025 Mr. Sundar Khan Chachar, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General along with complainant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant seeks bail in Crime No.68 of 2025, registered at Police Station Abad, District Sukkur, under Sections 511, 397, 34, PPC, wherein the complainant has lodged the report that his nephew was fired upon during the attempt of snatching of motorcycle. Learned Counsel for the applicant contends that the present applicant has not been named in the FIR nor any recovery from the said applicant has been made in the matter. He further states that the applicant was arrested on the basis of the statement of complainant made after nineteen days of the alleged incident. Complainant has already relied upon leaned Additional Prosecutor General for proceeding of the matter. Learned Additional PG, based upon the material available, extends his no objection for granting of this bail application. Accordingly, the bail application is allowed. Let applicant Syed Waqas Ali S/o Shahzaad be admitted to post-arrest bail in the aforesaid crime, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
